name: unknown-missing-harness-id
description: Reader normalization: no x-tapes-harness-id header at all decodes to harness_id 'unknown'.
grounding: A missing harness-id header parses as harness_id=unknown.
notes: harness_id normalizes to 'unknown'. Downstream, ingest derives a synthetic harness_session_id from the turn's content hash — outside the header-parse scope, so none is asserted here.
